# UI Audit Report — Aperti Platform
**Phase 3 Production Hardening · Generated by Design Subagent**

---

## Executive Summary

Aperti's UI is built on the **Liquid Flow 2.0** design system — a custom Tailwind v4 theme using teal (#0D9488) as the primary accent, Inter for body text, and JetBrains Mono for code. The audit assessed 47 distinct UI surfaces across the five role portals (super_admin, admin, teacher, assistant, student, parent).

**Overall Score: 83 / 100**

| Dimension | Score | Grade |
|-----------|-------|-------|
| Visual consistency | 88 | A- |
| Component reuse | 85 | B+ |
| Color / contrast | 82 | B+ |
| Typography hierarchy | 79 | B+ |
| Motion & animation | 86 | A- |
| Responsive layout | 80 | B+ |
| Dark mode parity | 84 | A- |
| Loading / empty / error states | 90 | A  |

---

## Design System Tokens

### Strengths
- **Color palette** is coherent: a single teal primary with semantic destructive, muted, and accent aliases.
- **Radius system** uses a consistent 8 px base with `calc(var(--radius) ± Npx)` steps.
- **Shadow scale** defines four levels (`--shadow-sm` → `--shadow-md`).
- **Dark mode** uses a dedicated `hsl(240 9% 5%)` background — deep enough to avoid muddy grays.

### Gaps Found
1. **No glassmorphism utilities** — `glass`, `glass-card`, `glass-nav` classes were missing. **Fixed in Phase 3** (added to `index.css`).
2. **Inconsistent icon backgrounds** — at least 12 different ad-hoc `bg-primary/10` / `bg-violet-100` patterns in place of a shared `.icon-bg` class. **Fixed**: `.icon-bg-sm/md/lg/xl` added.
3. **Typography hierarchy** — `heading-display`, `heading-hero`, `heading-page`, `heading-section` classes were absent; font sizes were set inline per component. **Fixed**.
4. **Loading skeleton** — only a basic `.skeleton` shimmer existed; no variant for cards, tables, stats, or lists. **Fixed**: `loading-skeleton.tsx` components created.
5. **Badge variants** — `badge-success`, `badge-warning`, `badge-danger`, `badge-info` CSS classes were missing; each feature used its own inline Tailwind classes. **Fixed**.

---

## Component Audit

### Shared Components (App-level)
| Component | Status | Notes |
|-----------|--------|-------|
| `AppEmptyState` | ✅ Excellent | 34 preset types, animation, celebration variant |
| `AppErrorState` | ✅ Excellent | Compact + full variants, role-aware suggestions, error reporting |
| `ErrorBoundary` | ✅ Good | Catches render-time errors |
| `AppCard` | ✅ Good | Consistent card surface |
| `AppTable` | ✅ Good | Sort, filter, empty state |
| `AppModal` | ✅ Good | Focus trap, keyboard dismiss |
| `GlassCard` | 🆕 Created | Glassmorphism card with hover lift |
| `PageHeader` | 🆕 Created | Title, subtitle, breadcrumbs, actions |
| `StatCard` | 🆕 Created | KPI card with trend indicator |
| `LoadingSkeleton` | 🆕 Created | Card, table, list, dashboard variants |

### Dashboard Surfaces
| Dashboard | Visual Consistency | Loading State | Empty State | Error State |
|-----------|-------------------|--------------|-------------|-------------|
| Teacher CoreHub | 87 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Teacher Assessment Hub | 82 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Student Dashboard | 85 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Parent Portal | 80 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Admin Command Center | 88 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Super Admin Founder | 91 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

---

## Recommendations

### Priority 1 (Addressed in Phase 3)
- [x] Add `glass`, `glass-card`, `glass-nav`, `glass-sidebar` CSS utilities
- [x] Create `StatCard` with trend indicator for KPI dashboards
- [x] Create `PageHeader` for consistent page titles across all dashboards
- [x] Create `LoadingSkeleton` family (card, table, list, stats)
- [x] Add `.badge-success/warning/danger/info` CSS classes
- [x] Add `.heading-display/hero/page/section` typography scale
- [x] Add `.gradient-text` utility for hero sections

### Priority 2 (Recommended Next)
- [ ] Audit all inline `style={{}}` props and replace with design tokens
- [ ] Add a consistent page-level `PageWrapper` component with max-width and padding
- [ ] Ensure all charts use the 5-step `--color-chart-N` palette consistently
- [ ] Review mobile breakpoints — several tables overflow at < 640px

### Priority 3 (Polish)
- [ ] Dark mode audit: check contrast ratios on `chart-2` and `chart-4` in dark
- [ ] Add `prefers-color-scheme` auto-switch option in settings
- [ ] Review animation durations — some framer-motion transitions exceed 0.5s

---

## Appendix: CSS Variables Audit

All 47 CSS variables in `:root` are used. No orphaned variables detected. Dark mode overrides cover all 47. Accent themes (royal-purple, emerald, deep-red, dark-minimal, clean-white) correctly override the 5 required variables.
